prompt:

male athlete with a toned, aesthetic physique sitting confidently on a matte black plyometric box, one leg extended and one bent, relaxed yet powerful posture
wearing a minimal beige sports set (fitted athletic t-shirt + tailored shorts), black crew socks and chunky modern trainers
black medicine ball placed beside his foot, subtle reflections on a glossy white floor surface
skin has glossy highlights (sweat sheen), sharp facial features, confident and focused expression, editorial fashion fitness vibe
composition: balanced negative space on left side for typography, subject placed slightly right
typography (left side):
“BUILT ON DISCIPLINE” — large bold modern sans-serif, muted beige color, high spacing, clean alignment
minimal logo below (simple geometric fitness brand mark)
bottom split layout:
– left panel: close-up portrait, dewy skin, intense gaze, text “FOCUS FUEL FINISH”
– right panel: seated relaxed pose holding medicine ball, text “TRAIN YOUR MIND. OWN YOUR RESULTS.”
ultra-clean composition, high contrast but bright tone, sharp details, premium sports campaign aesthetic, luxury brand advertising feel
style references: Nike / Gymshark / Alo Yoga campaign style
aspect ratio: 1:1
quality: 8K, ultra-detailed, sharp focus
